races.name: Weddings At Western House Novices' Hurdle (Go North Night Nurse Hurdle Series Qualifier) (GBB Race)

quotes: {'date': '2025-12-10', 'horse': 'Tashkhan', 'horse_id': 'hrs_23048564', 'race': 'Paxtons Now Stocking Stihl Equipment Maiden Hurdle (GBB Race)', 'race_id': 'rac_11800477', 'course': 'Hexham', 'course_id': 'crs_650', 'distance_f': '20', 'distance_y': '4428', 'quote': "It was a good learning experience for Tashkhan. Brian gave him a great ride and he jumped well while being a bit excited. He travelled nicely and it's good for him to win and get it out of the way. He just never had his ground last year. He needs it heavy, so we thought we'd try him jumping. He's had issues with his joints before but this year he's been grand, so it was the time to do it. He's done a fair bit of schooling and he's always done it well, he'll come on a lot for that. - Brian Ellison, trainer"}

{'date': '2023-10-29', 'horse': 'Tashkhan', 'horse_id': 'hrs_23048564', 'race': 'Prix Royal-Oak (Group 1) (3yo+) (Grande Course) (Turf)', 'race_id': 'rac_11093459', 'course': 'Longchamp', 'course_id': 'crs_5486', 'distance_f': '15.5', 'distance_y': '3410', 'quote': "Maybe if Tashkhan hadn't run in the Cesarewitch he could have been second. He's had all the travelling on top of Newmarket, where he had a hard race, but he's still run his heart out. We went to Chester because of ground, and we went to Newmarket because it went soft. We're governed by the ground and that's why he came here. But saying that, he's picked up over a hundred grand in three races so he hasn't done badly for a horse who cost very little money - Brian Ellison, trainer."}

{'date': '2023-10-14', 'horse': 'Tashkhan', 'horse_id': 'hrs_23048564', 'race': 'Club Godolphin Cesarewitch Handicap (Heritage Handicap)', 'race_id': 'rac_11008946', 'course': 'Newmarket', 'course_id': 'crs_988', 'distance_f': '18', 'distance_y': '3960', 'quote': "Tashkhan has run a massive race under top weight and that 4lb penalty he picked up for winning at Chester has just made the difference. We've kept him off fast ground and he's gone down fighting on a surface he loved - 'Brian Ellison, trainer."}

{'date': '2023-09-30', 'horse': 'Tashkhan', 'horse_id': 'hrs_23048564', 'race': 'Watergate Cup Handicap', 'race_id': 'rac_11031436', 'course': 'Chester', 'course_id': 'crs_338', 'distance_f': '18.5', 'distance_y': '4100', 'quote': "Tashkhan is a star. The rain came and that's all he wanted, fast ground is no good to him. That just shows you how good he is. I know he hasn't won for two years but he's had some hard races. There are three races he could go for. He's in the Cesarewitch, the Long Distance Cup on Champions day and the Royal-Oak and he'll go wherever the ground is right - Brian Ellison, trainer."}

{'date': '2022-10-01', 'horse': 'Tashkhan', 'horse_id': 'hrs_23048564', 'race': 'Qatar Prix du Cadran (Group 1) (4yo+) (New & Grande Course) (Turf)', 'race_id': 'rac_10692461', 'course': 'Longchamp', 'course_id': 'crs_5486', 'distance_f': '20', 'distance_y': '4400', 'quote': "Ben (Robinson) just said that having run four times on fast ground, Tashkan didn't know whether he was just thinking about that (early on). He said once he got his confidence he raced a bit better. But the winner's a machine isn't he? Just a different ballgame. This is just a cheap horse and he never lets me down. We might go to Ascot and if not we'll come back here for the Royal-Oak, I think that will be more likely - Brian Ellison, trainer."}

{'date': '2021-07-03', 'horse': 'Tashkhan', 'horse_id': 'hrs_23048564', 'race': 'bet365 Handicap', 'race_id': 'rac_10220821', 'course': 'Haydock', 'course_id': 'crs_598', 'distance_f': '14', 'distance_y': '3080', 'quote': "Tashkhan is very exciting and there are lots of options now. The soft ground is key to him, he wants a bit of cut and it really makes a difference. He's entered in the John Smith's Cup but with his three-year-old weight-for-age allowance, he won't get in. There's the Melrose at York and he could run against the older horses. The two-mile races could be an option as he stayed well there-Patrick Boyle, owner"}

{'date': '2021-03-27', 'horse': 'Tashkhan', 'horse_id': 'hrs_23048564', 'race': 'Follow Us On Twitter Handicap', 'race_id': 'rac_10152714', 'course': 'Navan', 'course_id': 'crs_5018', 'distance_f': '10', 'distance_y': '2200', 'quote': 'I would say getting gelded has made a big difference to Tashkan and he definitely has his mind more on the job. You could see that Ross was rowing away on him a long way out but he just kept galloping. Down the line I can see him making into a nice three-year-old hurdler - Emmet Mullins, trainer.'}

runners.owner: Two Black Labs And A Fox Red

races.name: Western House Hotel New Brunch Menu Handicap Chase (Go North One Man Series Qualifier) (GBB Race)

quotes: {'date': '2024-02-24', 'horse': 'Netywell', 'horse_id': 'hrs_24028746', 'race': 'Betting.Bet Cheltenham Festival Free Bets Handicap Chase (Go North One Man Series Qualifier)', 'race_id': 'rac_11170692', 'course': 'Newcastle', 'course_id': 'crs_962', 'distance_f': '16.5', 'distance_y': '3595', 'quote': "Netywell is amazing. Heavy ground has made the difference to him. It doesn't matter if it's a good race or a bad race, he just copes with the ground really well. He seems to be improving as well and that was a quick turnaround. He'll keep going while the ground stays right - Lucinda Russell, trainer."}

{'date': '2023-12-23', 'horse': 'Netywell', 'horse_id': 'hrs_24028746', 'race': 'Betfred Hot Shots Handicap Chase', 'race_id': 'rac_11118705', 'course': 'Haydock', 'course_id': 'crs_598', 'distance_f': '16.5', 'distance_y': '3587', 'quote': "Things didn't go quite right for Netywell last time but when he gets heavy ground on a sharp track he has proven he can run to a decent level - Michael Scudamore, assistant trainer."}

{'date': '2025-03-07', 'horse': 'Ballyfort', 'horse_id': 'hrs_30122904', 'race': 'Weatherbys Scientific Handicap Hurdle (Go North Sea Pigeon Series Qualifier)', 'race_id': 'rac_11534926', 'course': 'Ayr', 'course_id': 'crs_78', 'distance_f': '16', 'distance_y': '3520', 'quote': "I'm really happy with Ballyfort. Last time his head came up and he didn't quite go through with it, but he did this time, so that's brilliant - Nick Alexander, trainer."}

races.name: Mothers Day Lunch At Western House Mares' Handicap Hurdle (For The Ayrshire Yeomanry Cup) (Qual')
3B Crane Hire Handicap Hurdle (For The Craigie Cup) (Go North Sea Pigeon Series Qualifier)

runners.owner: Trotters International By A & L McLaren

quotes: {'date': '2026-02-13', 'horse': 'Triple Crown Ted', 'horse_id': 'hrs_49111132', 'race': 'Racing TV Club Day Handicap Hurdle (Challenger Two Mile Hurdle Series Qualifier)', 'race_id': 'rac_11849409', 'course': 'Kelso', 'course_id': 'crs_702', 'distance_f': '16', 'distance_y': '3571', 'quote': "We felt Triple Crown Ted ran too free at Ayr last time and Derek understood we needed to change tactics and sit him in to try to get him to switch off. We've always thought a lot of him - Peter Scudamore, assistant trainer."}

runners.owner: Mrs David Coltman & Mrs J Douglas Miller

quotes: {'date': '2022-07-31', 'horse': 'Cormier', 'horse_id': 'hrs_15289085', 'race': 'White Horse Kids Eat Free Handicap', 'race_id': 'rac_10608806', 'course': 'Chester', 'course_id': 'crs_338', 'distance_f': '10.5', 'distance_y': '2270', 'quote': "Cormier is tough and consistent and always manages to pull it out of the bag. He stays two miles so I was a bit worried about the trip, but he loved it. They were Brian's [Ellison] orders to bring the horse wide - Harry Russell, jockey."}

{'date': '2022-03-05', 'horse': 'Cormier', 'horse_id': 'hrs_15289085', 'race': 'bet365 Morebattle Hurdle (A Handicap Hurdle) (GBB Race)', 'race_id': 'rac_10442822', 'course': 'Kelso', 'course_id': 'crs_702', 'distance_f': '16', 'distance_y': '3571', 'quote': "Cormier was very keen when we first got him but he's settled now. He's grown up a bit and he's a lot easier at home. Early on Sean said he was off the bit, they were going that quick, then he's come hard on it round the top bend. If anything he got there too early but he tries. Taking the hurdles out didn't bother him because he's won a few on the Flat. Cheltenham will be different but we know he acts round there. Whether he's good enough doesn't matter, he's won a 100,000GBP race and his owner lives just over the road from Cheltenham - Brian Ellison, trainer."}

{'date': '2022-01-29', 'horse': 'Cormier', 'horse_id': 'hrs_15289085', 'race': 'SSS Super Alloys Handicap Hurdle (GBB Race)', 'race_id': 'rac_10418421', 'course': 'Cheltenham', 'course_id': 'crs_286', 'distance_f': '17', 'distance_y': '3699', 'quote': "Cormier made one mistake at three out, I know it's on a different course but he did exactly the same thing in the Greatwood. He came back on the bridle fairly quickly after and I was always happy. Every time I asked he was always giving me a bit, he's a nice horse and they'll have plenty of fun seeing where he ends up. It could be here in March (County Hurdle) - Jonny Burke, jockey."}

{'date': '2021-07-09', 'horse': 'Cormier', 'horse_id': 'hrs_15289085', 'race': 'williamhill.com Best Odds Guaranteed Handicap', 'race_id': 'rac_10233652', 'course': 'York', 'course_id': 'crs_2782', 'distance_f': '12', 'distance_y': '2608', 'quote': "Cormier has got very good hurdle form and he's fresh off a run from Pontefract where he won quite easily. My only doubt for today was the sun drying the ground out but his class brought him through it and he got away with it. His owner Dan Gilbert loves dual-purpose horses so I'd say he'll do a bit of both - Ben Robinson, jockey."}

{'date': '2022-02-22', 'horse': 'Irish Blaze', 'horse_id': 'hrs_23281132', 'race': 'P.S. Supplies Doors & Floors Maiden Hurdle', 'race_id': 'rac_10472579', 'course': 'Navan', 'course_id': 'crs_5018', 'distance_f': '16', 'distance_y': '3470', 'quote': "Irish Blaze did well to win, we think he would prefer better ground. He'll race away for the summer and all he'll do is stay - Gordon Elliott, trainer."}

{'date': '2024-04-12', 'horse': 'El Jefe', 'horse_id': 'hrs_19768658', 'race': "Alder Hey Handicap Hurdle (Conditional Jockeys' And Amateur Riders' Race) (GBB Race)", 'race_id': 'rac_11221678', 'course': 'Aintree', 'course_id': 'crs_832', 'distance_f': '16.5', 'distance_y': '3623', 'quote': "El Jefe was was 66-1 last night and I couldn't believe the price. That was a class ride, like a professional. I said not to go too early - Andrew Hamilton, trainer."}

{'date': '2023-12-23', 'horse': 'El Jefe', 'horse_id': 'hrs_19768658', 'race': "Betfred Nifty 50 Conditional Jockeys' Handicap Hurdle", 'race_id': 'rac_11118744', 'course': 'Haydock', 'course_id': 'crs_598', 'distance_f': '19', 'distance_y': '4151', 'quote': "El Jefe never lifted the bridle at all last year and I couldn't get to the bottom of it but he's come back this year like a new fella, he loves life. I was glad to see so much rain because he loves the muck and he was getting a lot of weight from the other horses. He never finds a lot, but he will keep galloping. I'm delighted - Andrew Hamilton, trainer."}

{'date': '2026-01-08', 'horse': 'Pour Les Filles', 'horse_id': 'hrs_30123016', 'race': "DragonBet Best Odds Guaranteed UK Racing Novices' Limited Handicap Chase (GBB Race)", 'race_id': 'rac_11843819', 'course': 'Ffos Las', 'course_id': 'crs_31512', 'distance_f': '19.5', 'distance_y': '4263', 'quote': "We've had Pour Les Filles for about five or six weeks, but everything he has done has really impressed us. He has always looked like a chaser, and proved it there. He'll go further in time. He was novicey over the first few and then he was away ? he didn't put a foot wrong. He had some really good form with Gordon, who did a lovely job with him and that attracted us - Mickey Bowen, trainer."}

{'date': '2022-12-26', 'horse': 'Pour Les Filles', 'horse_id': 'hrs_30123016', 'race': 'Race And Stay At Leopardstown INH Flat Race', 'race_id': 'rac_10781381', 'course': 'Leopardstown', 'course_id': 'crs_4862', 'distance_f': '16', 'distance_y': '3520', 'quote': "Pour Les Filles is a horse for the future. He probably won't do a whole lot more this season. We might give him a run in a nice hurdles race and then put him away until next season. Davy Russell (who bought him as a three-year-old) has had him before and knows all about him. He's not really a bumper horse and we'll take our time with him. He did well to get back on top because his ground got taken. If he hadn't won he'd have been unlucky - Gordon Elliott, trainer"}

{'date': '2024-12-21', 'horse': 'Classic Maestro', 'horse_id': 'hrs_29523081', 'race': "Betfred 'Classic Bookmaker' Beginners' Chase (GBB Race)", 'race_id': 'rac_11471330', 'course': 'Haydock', 'course_id': 'crs_598', 'distance_f': '16.5', 'distance_y': '3587', 'quote': "On form, Classic Maestro should have done that. It's a shame only two turned up, but his jumping was foot-perfect. He's kept improving and there should be more to come. We'll freshen him up for a couple of weeks, but he loves heavy ground and we'll have to make use of that. He should get further and can step up to two and a half miles - Alan O'Keeffe, assistant trainer."}

{'date': '2025-10-16', 'horse': 'Dare To Shout', 'horse_id': 'hrs_29409821', 'race': 'Vesta Wealth Handicap Chase (Challenger Staying Chase Series Qualifier) (GBB Race)', 'race_id': 'rac_11744772', 'course': 'Carlisle', 'course_id': 'crs_208', 'distance_f': '24.5', 'distance_y': '5390', 'quote': "Dare To Shout thought he'd won the race after the last, but then they all came to him. To his credit, he stuck his neck out again. We always thought he'd stay three miles and, if anything, he's enjoyed the better ground today - Danny McMenamin, jockey, speaking to Racing TV."}

{'date': '2024-11-03', 'horse': 'Dare To Shout', 'horse_id': 'hrs_29409821', 'race': "Gordon Richards Novices' Limited Handicap Chase (GBB Race)", 'race_id': 'rac_11411634', 'course': 'Carlisle', 'course_id': 'crs_208', 'distance_f': '20', 'distance_y': '4390', 'quote': "Dare To Shout is not a big horse but I like the way he jumps as he's neat. He'll appreciate soft ground and three miles better - Ian Hamilton, owner."}

{'date': '2023-02-17', 'horse': 'Dare To Shout', 'horse_id': 'hrs_29409821', 'race': "Johnston Smillie Novices' Hurdle (Novices' Championship Hurdle Series Qualifier) (GBB Race)", 'race_id': 'rac_10807589', 'course': 'Kelso', 'course_id': 'crs_702', 'distance_f': '16', 'distance_y': '3571', 'quote': "DARE TO SHOUT is a nice little horse. He did the job well and he'll jump a fence one day. Ian Hamilton speaking to Racing TV."}

{'date': '2024-02-27', 'horse': 'Twoshotsoftequila', 'horse_id': 'hrs_23596622', 'race': 'Visit racingtv.com Handicap Chase (Go North Red Rum Series Qualifier)', 'race_id': 'rac_11181079', 'course': 'Catterick', 'course_id': 'crs_260', 'distance_f': '25.5', 'distance_y': '5554', 'quote': "Twoshotsoftequila enjoyed the better ground and he wasn't travelling well in the Great Yorkshire Chase last time when our horses were perhaps not running that well. He's unlikely to get into the Kim Muir but we'll keep our options open - trainer Rebecca Menzies speaking on Racing TV."}

{'date': '2025-02-14', 'horse': 'Primoz', 'horse_id': 'hrs_34760047', 'race': 'Racing TV Profits Returned To Racing Handicap Chase (GBB Race)', 'race_id': 'rac_11520457', 'course': 'Kelso', 'course_id': 'crs_702', 'distance_f': '17', 'distance_y': '3754', 'quote': "Primoz is one of the most talented horses we've dealt with and we've changed his training programme a bit. I don't know where he'll go next but he's a very talented horse if we can get some consistency into him - Lucinda Russell, trainer."}

{'date': '2024-10-16', 'horse': 'Primoz', 'horse_id': 'hrs_34760047', 'race': 'Mary Lofthouse Supporting Spinal Research Handicap Chase', 'race_id': 'rac_11396255', 'course': 'Wetherby', 'course_id': 'crs_2262', 'distance_f': '15', 'distance_y': '3336', 'quote': "I got worried because I'd said Primoz is a lovely horse, he's been a great hurdler and is going to make a better chaser, then the chips are down and he's got to prove it. But I think he is going to be a better chaser. I loved the way he jumped - and I believe El Elefante did the same at Worcester, so happy days! Pay The Piper is a real decent two-miler and Primoz was pretty good today - Lucinda Russell, trainer."}

{'date': '2024-04-19', 'horse': 'Primoz', 'horse_id': 'hrs_34760047', 'race': 'Remus Uomo Handicap Hurdle', 'race_id': 'rac_11222822', 'course': 'Ayr', 'course_id': 'crs_78', 'distance_f': '16', 'distance_y': '3520', 'quote': "I'm delighted with Primoz. He won well first time then he's been in the wilderness but it's the ground, he doesn't like it soft. He's got a lot of ability and we just needed to get him tighter at home. He looked great today and he'll go chasing next season - Lucinda Russell, trainer."}

races.name: Cheltenham Lunch At Western House Hotel Novices' Handicap Hurdle

runners.owner: Mrs H Plumbly J Trafford K Deane S Holme

quotes: {'date': '2025-12-27', 'horse': 'Kalo Athena', 'horse_id': 'hrs_39431448', 'race': "William Hill Daily Bet Boosts Conditional Jockeys' Handicap Hurdle", 'race_id': 'rac_11813841', 'course': 'Wetherby', 'course_id': 'crs_2262', 'distance_f': '24', 'distance_y': '5306', 'quote': "Kalo Athena is a nice mare, we've always thought a bit of her but it's taken a while for the penny to drop. The three-mile trip made the difference today. She ran round Cartmel a few times but it wasn't for her so we put her away and she's done nothing but thrive since she came back. Two miles four was sharp enough for her round Carlisle last time - Jimmy Moffatt, trainer."}

races.name: Book Day Dancin 11 april@ayr Racecourse Open National Hunt Flat Race (Category 1 Elimination) (GBB)
